problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
